summary: Completed comprehensive testing of bilingual e-commerce store. Backend APIs functional (10/13 tests passed), frontend navigation and language toggle working well. Found authentication flow issues and missing Add to Cart functionality on product detail pages.

minor_issues.issue: Network timeout during invalid login test
minor_issues.impact: Test reliability issue, not functional issue

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login gets stuck in loading state despite backend API working correctly
Add to Cart button not found on product detail pages

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login flow fails while backend API works correctly - likely cookie/session handling issue

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, and featured products
Language toggle switches between English and Arabic with RTL support
Products page shows all products with search and filter functionality
Search functionality updates URL parameters correctly
Cart icon shows proper authentication requirement
Backend products API working (including search, featured products)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication flow issues: 1) Admin login gets stuck in loading state on frontend despite backend API working correctly - investigate cookie/session handling. 2) Add missing 'Add to Cart' button on product detail pages. 3) Verify cart functionality works after login flow is fixed.
